description: Git investigation ops — answer debugging questions in one call

git-status.description: Where am I? Branch, commits, changes, stashes, open MR/PR — full context in one call.

git-investigate.description: What happened to this file? Commits, uncommitted changes, blame hotspots — answer 'why is this broken?' in one call.

git-trail.description: When was this added or changed? Trace a constant, function, or pattern through history — who introduced it and why.

git-blame.description: Who wrote this line? Blame N lines around a specific line number with author, date, and commit.
